would_sdk_have_been_faster: NO. Two curl calls got the complete contract: base URL, auth model, endpoint, body shape, idempotency requirement, error catalogue, and the SSE events URL for settlement. An SDK would have added install time, a dependency, and hidden the exact wire protocol behind a wrapper. The llms.txt plus one skill file is the optimal path for an agent — it returns agent-actionable markdown specifically designed for machine consumption, with every error carrying an agent_action hint. SDK docs would have taken more fetches to surface the same information.
answer_to_human: To pay an invoice on FlowLink, an agent makes a single authenticated POST request and optionally streams settlement events. FlowLink is a compliance-first crypto payment layer that settles on HashKey Chain (id 133) and deliberately ships no SDK — agents speak HTTPS directly. First, the agent obtains a bearer token. The recommended path is SIWE (Sign-In with Ethereum, EIP-4361): call POST /v1/auth/siwe/nonce, sign the returned message with the wallet, then POST /v1/auth/siwe/verify to receive a JWT. For development, a scoped API key generated from the FlowLink dashboard works equivalently. The token must carry the pay:execute scope and is sent as Authorization: Bearer on every /v1/* call. Second, with a valid invoice_id already in hand (produced by a prior invoice.create call), the agent issues POST https://flowlink.ink/v1/pay with an Idempotency-Key header (a fresh UUID, 24-hour replay window) and a JSON body containing invoice_id, payer_address, and token (USDC, USDT, or HSK). FlowLink runs OFAC sanctions screening and velocity checks inline before any funds move; failure returns a Problem+JSON error with a code and an agent_action telling the agent whether to stop, retry with backoff, or escalate. On success, the API returns 202 Accepted with a transaction_id, an HSP Single-Pay Mandate ID, a checkout_url, compliance score, and an events_url. Third, the agent optionally opens an SSE stream at GET /v1/transactions/{txn_id}/events to watch compliance_passed, mandate_created, settled (with on-chain tx_hash and block number), and receipt_ready events. Expected settlement is about thirty seconds. Afterward the agent can fetch the ed25519-signed receipt via the receipt skill for cryptographic proof of payment.
